children.label: API Key
children.content:
Set your API key for API requests.

```javascript
client.setApiKey('YOUR_API_KEY');
```

children.label: Model
children.content:
Set the model for text/image generation.

```javascript
client.setModel('flux');
```

children.label: System Prompt
children.content:
Set the system prompt guiding the AI.

```javascript
client.setSystemPrompt('You are a helpful assistant.');
```

children.label: Timeout
children.content:
Set request timeout in milliseconds.

```javascript
client.setTimeout(30000);
```

children.label: Seed
children.content:
Set a random seed for reproducibility.

```javascript
client.setSeed(12345);
```

children.label: Retry Logic
children.content:
Configure retry attempts and delay.

```javascript
client.setRetry(true, 2, 1000);
```

children.label: Image Dimensions
children.content:
Set width and height for image generation.

```javascript
client.setDimensions(1024, 1024);
```

children.label: Generate Text
Generate Image
